summary: Iteration 55 review (admin panel refactor + intake rate limit + UX polish). All 8 changes verified end-to-end via pytest (intake-rate-limit endpoint suite) and Playwright (admin panels render, settings save toast, therapist signup labels/placeholder/optional phone, signin password divider, patient portal signout). Backend 11/11 new + 11/11 regression passing. Frontend smoke for every requested testid passing.

admin_dashboard_panels.more-tab-settings: settings-panel rendered=True; rate-limit-max-input/window-input/save-btn all present; defaults max=1, window=60; save toast='Rate limit saved'

verifications.intake_rate_limit_pytest: 11/11 PASSED — GET defaults, PUT validation (5 invalid payloads), PUT round-trip + GET, second POST returns 429 with 'You can submit up to 1 request per hour' detail, raised limit allows second POST, admin auth required on GET/PUT.

therapist_signup.name_label: 'Full name + degree (e.g. Sarah Lin, LCSW) *' — no 'MA, '
therapist_signup.phone_alert: label 'Phone (private, alerts)' — no Req asterisk; helper text mentions 'Optional — for SMS alerts'

verifications.intake_checkout_terms_privacy: Code-confirmed in IntakeForm.jsx 832-862: agree-terms-link href='/terms', agree-privacy-link href='/privacy', both target='_blank' rel='noreferrer'. Both routes return 200 over the public URL.
verifications.patient_portal_signout: /portal/patient with no/invalid session redirects to /sign-in?role=patient (replace) — confirmed via live navigation. PatientPortal.jsx has NO 'patient-portal-new-request' testid anywhere (grep clean); signOut() navigates to /sign-in?role=patient.
verifications.signin_password_divider: On /sign-in?role=therapist, typing portaltest@example.com surfaces signin-password-section ('Sign in with password' divider, 'Welcome back — we found an account for portaltest@example.com'). Typing nobody-<ts>@example.com hides that section and shows signin-no-password-hint with one-time code copy.

critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx is still 4448 lines after refactor — recommended next iteration to extract Requests/Therapists/Pending/All Providers tabs into /pages/admin/panels for consistency.
patients.py rate-limit gate uses string-isoformat compare on `created_at` (line 121). Works because created_at is stored as ISO string, but a typed `datetime` index would scale better. Low priority.

PUT /admin/intake-rate-limit accepts `payload: dict` instead of a Pydantic model — current manual validation is fine but a Pydantic IntakeRateLimitConfig with Field(ge=1, le=50) etc would self-document the schema.
test_credentials: Admin master password admin123! (Master password tab on /admin). Therapist password account: portaltest@example.com / testpass123 (used only to verify signin-password-section render — no actual login attempted).
seed_data_creation: Test rate-limit fixture toggles app_config.intake_rate_limit and always restores default (1 / 60min) on teardown. Each POST /api/requests test uses a unique TEST_iter55_<uuid> email to avoid cross-test rate-limit pollution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 is fully green: per-email intake rate limit (1/hr default, admin-tunable via Settings panel + GET/PUT /api/admin/intake-rate-limit), admin panels refactor into /pages/admin/panels (master-query, opt-outs, team, blog, settings), therapist signup label/placeholder/optional phone, signin password divider + welcome-back, patient portal signout to /sign-in?role=patient, intake checkout terms/privacy links. Regression: test_iteration3_rate_limit.py 11/11 passing. New file test_iteration55_rate_limit.py covers GET/PUT/429 round-trips. AdminDashboard.jsx still 4448 lines — candidate for next refactor pass.
rca of the issue: N/A — review iteration, no bugs found.
